theme: Light & Dark Mode (User customizable primary color)
design_principles: Warm-toned grays/stones instead of sterile blue-grays to evoke approachability.
High contrast for legibility, minimizing decorative elements.
Flat, cardless or sharp-edged card design with max 8px radius.

primary.note: Default primary is a warm Rust/Terracotta, but the platform is white-label and this will be customizable.

layout.spacing_scale: Dense configuration: p-2, p-4, p-6. Avoid excessive padding in data views.
layout.grid_system: The Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
layout.alignment: Strictly left-aligned for all paragraphs, forms, tables, and dense content.
layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look): Expose the skeleton. Use pure border-collapse style layouts or 1px subtle borders (border-border). No soft shadows.

components.sidebar: Fixed left, dark or light variant based on theme, dense link list with small icons.
components.cards: Cardless approach or flat with 1px border. Max border-radius: 8px (rounded-md or rounded-sm). Hover state: slight darkering of border, no shadow lift.
components.buttons: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md). High contrast. Hover must lighten/darken clearly.
components.inputs: Shadcn default but customized to have ring-0 on focus, instead use a strong 1px border of primary color.
components.kanban: Horizontal scrolling, dense task cards, tags with low opacity backgrounds.

motion.hover: Subtle color shifts, no bouncing or scaling for data elements.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight, small sizes (16px or 20px) to maintain density.

images.description: Warm abstract background for login/signup screens

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-crm').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components are implemented as .js files, NOT .tsx.
Do NOT use HTML-based components for advanced user interactions; use Shadcn equivalents.
For the UI, adopt a 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard. Elements should fit tightly together.
For typography, do not use Inter. Install and configure 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Satoshi'.
Replace Shadcn's default borders/radii with max 8px radii (rounded-md) to match the technical, dense feel.
Ensure the application supports standard tailwind dark mode classes (dark:bg-...).
Build the dashboard focusing on progressive disclosure: show the most important metric first, reveal secondary detail through interactions.
Install `@phosphor-icons/react` for icons to ensure a technical and dense appearance.
